name: Grilled Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggplant and cut into 3/4-inch slices.
2. Combine butter, garlic salt, and Italian seasoning; stir well.
3. Brush eggplant slices with the butter mixture and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Place eggplant about 3 to 4 inches from coals.
5. Grill over medium coals for 10 minutes or until tender, turning and basting occasionally.
